title: bergenia ligulata var. cliata
intro: Bergenia ligulata var. cliata, also known as Elephant's Ears or Bergenia, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's extracts have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and acting as a natural antiseptic to prevent infections. Bergenia ligulata var. cliata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions.
